title: Stephens White Poster Roll 80gsm, 10m x 76cm, Ideal for Drawing, Painting, Sketches, Backdrop, Making Posters, Notice Boards and Large Art Work, Great for Use in School, Home and Office, Large Roll
features: LARGE Poster roll measures 10m long and 76cm wide, allowing for many uses. Coloured paper can be used for drawing, as simple gift wrapping paper, or bubble wrap alternative.Poster kraft paper roll is durable and stronger than tissue paper

USE At home, school, college, or in the office, for anything from wrapping a present to large drawing and painting. It can also be used as a table runner that the kids can draw on, or as birthday, baby shower, wedding, and Christmas wrapping paper

USES Paper poster rolls can be used for office, classroom and school notice boards, wall art for kitchen, an alternative to brown paper rolls, or shredded tissue paper, packing paper or as a drawing board colouring table sheet for children

PLAYTIME For children has never been more fun, let them get creative by painting, drawing, scribbling, jotting and colouring in on the table.Poster rolls provide less mess as there will be no scraps of paper, just unroll the poster, and roll away

VARIETY Available in White, Red, Green, Yellow, Black and Blue rolls, large drawing paper roll can be used with paint sticks, felt tip pens, paint, hand or finger painting, and more. Perfect for craft
description: From the manufacturer About Stephens & West Design The Stephens brand provides a wide variety of craft, office and art based products ranging from paper & card to seasonal holiday craft packs/sets. The Stephens range is mostly noted for its poster rolls, pads, craft card & paper such as tissue/crepe paper, tracing paper, transfer paper for clothing design and various coloured card, seasonal craft packs, glitter & foil boards, sticker & label packs and other arts & crafts based products. Stephens products are supplied & manufactured by West Design Products. West is a family owned business, a situation which is set to continue, the current owners have seen the company develop and expand through acquisition and consolidation. West is now a significant supplier, both in the home market and through export, to the stationery, art, craft, toy and education trade. Introducing the Stephens Poster Roll Bundle! 8 Poster Rolls Included! In 6 different colours. Savings! By purchasing rolls as a bundle, you save money! Great for Offices or Education Facilities Poster rolls are a perfect edition for meeting rooms or classrooms to make posters, banners, presentations & more. Colours included: Red Yellow Blue Green Black x 2 White x 2 Stephens Poster Roll Colours Red 10 metres of 80gsm red poster roll. Available seperately or as part of the poster roll bundle (1 provided in bundle). Yellow 10 metres of 80gsm yellow poster roll. Available seperately or as part of the poster roll bundle (1 provided in bundle). Blue 10 metres of 80gsm blue poster roll. Available seperately or as part of the poster roll bundle (1 provided in bundle). Stephens Poster Roll Colours Green 10 metres of 80gsm green poster roll. Available seperately or as part of the poster roll bundle (1 provided in bundle). White 10 metres of 80gsm white poster roll. Available seperately or as part of the poster roll bundle (2 provided in bundle). Black 10 metres of 80gsm black poster roll. Available seperately or as part of the poster roll bundle (2 provided in bundle).
